objective: Deterministic interpretation-aware promotion hardening with adversarial reliability proof.

phase_0_baseline.finding: Pre-hardening promotion behavior defaulted most adversarial inputs to FYI/ignore.

changes: Added interpretation taxonomy and confidence threshold.
Implemented deterministic interpretation for cancellation, time change, deadline, obligation, ambiguity, informational.
Added dependency-aware schedule matching and conflict checks.
Added calendar_update path with cancellation/time-change handling.
Added confidence fallback routing to decision cards.
Promotion response and effects now include interpretation_type, interpretation_confidence, promotion_reason.
Promotion events now include dependency_schedule_id, conflict_schedule_id, secondary_entity fields.
Promoted task/schedule records now store interpretation_type and promotion_reason.
Replay validation now rejects household_item_promoted events missing interpretation_type, promotion_reason, or promotion_target.
Replay projection now preserves added promotion traceability fields.

items: Architecture contract startup warning remains pre-existing and was not in scope for this hardening pass.
Interpretation remains deterministic and keyword/rule-driven by design.

phase_9_release_recommendation.recommendation: Promote this hardening patch. Continue monitoring for new linguistic variants and expand adversarial fixtures incrementally.
